tool_calls: cd /workspace && log_lines=$(find . -type f -name '*.log' -print0 | xargs -0 cat 2>/dev/null | wc -l) && errors=$(find . -type f -name '*.log' -print0 | xargs -0 grep -h 'ERROR' 2>/dev/null | wc -l) && printf 'Total log lines: %s\nTotal errors: %s\n' "$log_lines" "$errors"

tool_outputs.commands: cd /workspace && log_lines=$(find . -type f -name '*.log' -print0 | xargs -0 cat 2>/dev/null | wc -l) && errors=$(find . -type f -name '*.log' -print0 | xargs -0 grep -h 'ERROR' 2>/dev/null | wc -l) && printf 'Total log lines: %s\nTotal errors: %s\n' "$log_lines" "$errors"
